# SecItemImportExportFlags

**Structure**

The import and export function flags.

## Declaration

```swift
struct SecItemImportExportFlags
```

## Overview

Use an instance of this structure a the flags input to the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecItemImport(_:_:_:_:_:_:_:_:)] and [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecItemExport(_:_:_:_:_:)] functions.

## Initializers

- **init(rawValue:)**: Initialize an item import/export flag structure.

## Constants

- **pemArmour**: A flag that indicates the exported data should have PEM armor.

## Conforms To

- BitwiseCopyable
- Equatable
- ExpressibleByArrayLiteral
- OptionSet
- RawRepresentable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
- SetAlgebra
